description: Invoke when advising on context engineering, writing CLAUDE.md files, setting up projects, designing agent architectures, or optimizing any mechanism that shapes Claude's input. Decision framework for choosing between Skills, CLAUDE.md, Prompts, Projects, MCP, Subagents, User Preferences, and Hooks. Optimize Claude's context for better outcomes.

results.query: How should I structure my CLAUDE.md file for this repo?
Claude keeps forgetting my project conventions halfway through long sessions.
Set up this monorepo so Claude works well in every service.
Should I use a skill or an MCP server for this integration?
My system prompt is huge and responses seem to be getting worse over time.
How do I decide between a subagent and a plugin for this task?
We keep re-explaining the same coding standards every conversation, what's the fix?
Design the architecture for a multi-agent pipeline that stays token-efficient.
Which Claude model should I use for this classification task, Haiku or Sonnet?
Write a Python function to parse this CSV file.
Design a vector database schema for our product search RAG pipeline.
Fix the null pointer exception in this React component.
What's the pricing difference between Claude Opus and Sonnet API calls?
Write a one-time prompt to summarize this single email.
Why is my API call returning a 429 rate limit error?
Help me debug why this unit test is failing.
